name: Epidemic
ability: Evil players "are the Demon". Each night, a fresh player chooses a player: they become their alignment. If all players are the same alignment, their team wins. [No Minions. 1 player is evil]
flavor: YUCK!! Why am I so slimy?! (v1.2)
firstNightReminder: Wake an evil player & show them the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Epidemic tokens. They choose a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & a thumbs up or thumbs down.
otherNightReminder: Wake a player that has yet to be woken to choose a player by the Epidemic's ability & show them the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* & Epidemic tokens. They choose a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* token & a thumbs up or thumbs down.
